what: Validate frontmatter fields (tags, description, auto_load) against schema
why: Ensure knowledge metadata is complete and valid before writing file

output.console: Validation result listing any missing or invalid frontmatter fields

success_handling.criteria: All required frontmatter fields (tags, description, auto_load) are present and conform to schema types and constraints

error_handling.criteria: One or more required frontmatter fields (tags, description) are absent from the input
error_handling.action: Return validation error listing missing fields, prompt user to provide them

error_handling.criteria: Tags array contains entries that do not match the allowed tag format (e.g., non-string, empty, special characters)
error_handling.action: Return validation error with invalid tags listed and expected format hint

decisions.outcome: Abort creation, return validation errors to user
